dotnet mystique tool (1.2.0.0)

Usage: dotnet mystique [options]
Usage: dotnet mystique [command] [command-options]

options:
  --version		Display the tool version
  --help		Display the command line help

commands:

Run 'dotnet mystique [command] --help' for more information on a command.
